name: Library Assistant
description: Steady, low-drama campus work that is easier to sustain.

name: Campus Rec Attendant
description: Moderate pay with regular shifts and manageable wear.

name: Barista
description: Strong weekly cash flow, but rushes and customers hit hard.

name: Food Delivery
description: High hourly income with major fatigue and pressure.

name: Tutoring
description: Best hourly pay, but fewer hours cap total weekly income.
